headline: You Can Buy 1 Share of Costco for Less Than $1,000 Right Now. Here's Why the Price Could Go Up by the End of 2030.
summary: Costco trades at a premium to every discount retail peer. Here's why this warehouse giant could still keep climbing through 2030.

headline: America can't get enough of protein. The dairy industry can't keep up
summary: Demand for whey protein is off the charts as American diet trends change and GLP-1s boom, and the dairy industry is struggling to produce enough.

headline: Should You Buy Costco Wholesale Corporation (COST)’s Shares?
summary: Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) is one of the 10 Best Stocks to Buy According to Billionaire Richard Chilton. Membership warehouse retailer Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST)’s shares are down by 2.4% over the past year and are up by 12.3% year-to-date. headline: From protein coffee to CBD soda: How brands are cashing in on the functional beverage boom
summary: "We're selling [almost] as much protein cold foam as we do flat whites," Starbuck's EMEA Manager of Beverage Development Sam Henderson told CNBC.

headline: Citi Resumes Coverage of Costco (COST)
summary: Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) is one of the 12 Most Profitable S&P 500 Stocks to Invest In. On June 18, 2026, Citi resumed coverage of Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) with a Neutral rating and a $1,020 price target. Citi views Costco as a long-term market share gainer but sees balanced risk/reward at current share levels. […]
